rewritten_requirements: The system shall identify possible coronavirus 'hotspots' around a user's area.
The system shall alert users about their proximity to a nearby infection case or hotspot.
The system shall help users self-identify their risk and monitor their health assessment.
The system shall alert users about the best safety precautions.
The system shall list down basic quarantine measures for high-risk individuals.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Identify possible coronavirus 'hotspot' around a user's area
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The Aarogya Setu app, which is a coronavirus tracker of sorts works on the basis of contact tracing and can help a user identify possible coronavirus ‘hotspot’ around his or her area.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Alert users about their proximity to a nearby infection case or hotspot
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: On the basis of geotagging, it can also alert a specific user about their proximity to a nearby infection case or hotspot.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Help users self-identify their risk and monitor their health assessment
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The app also helps users self-identify their risk and monitor their health assessment, considering the times when it can get difficult (and most of all, is not particularly safe to step out and visit health clinics).

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Alert users about the best safety precautions
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Aarogya Setu app also helps people identify the symptoms, alert them about the best safety precautions and other relevant information concerning the spread of COVID-19.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: List down basic quarantine measures for high-risk individuals
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: It can also help people, who have had a travel history self-quarantine and prevent any risk of transmission (Figures 23.1–23.8).
